name: claude-interrogate
description: Design-doc interrogation plugin for Claude Code with MCP-backed interview, audit, and sync flows.

interface.shortDescription: Interrogate, audit, and sync design docs
interface.longDescription: Design-doc tooling for Claude Code. It runs adversarial design interviews, generates house-style specs, audits doc sets for contradictions and stale questions, and syncs cross-references across related documents.
defaultPrompt: Interrogate a new design concept against my existing docs
Audit this docs folder for contradictions and missing links
Sync cross-references across the current design-doc set
